verses.text: A beast rises from the sea, with seven heads and ten horns, to whom 'the dragon gave him his power.' Beast from sea. Satan empowers a blasphemous world-kingdom.
A beast rises from the sea, with seven heads and ten horns, to whom 'the dragon gave him his power.' Beast from sea. Satan empowers a blasphemous world-kingdom.
One head was wounded to death yet healed, and the world wondered, worshipping the dragon and beast: 'Who is able to make war with him?' Worshipped. The whole earth follows the beast.
One head was wounded to death yet healed, and the world wondered, worshipping the dragon and beast: 'Who is able to make war with him?' Worshipped. The whole earth follows the beast.
He was given 'a mouth speaking great things and blasphemies,' to act 'forty and two months,' railing against God. Blasphemer. He defies heaven for his appointed time.
He was given 'a mouth speaking great things and blasphemies,' to act 'forty and two months,' railing against God. Blasphemer. He defies heaven for his appointed time.
Power was given to make war on the saints; 'all that dwell upon the earth shall worship him' whose names are not in the Lamb's book. Two camps. Only the redeemed refuse him.
Power was given to make war on the saints; 'all that dwell upon the earth shall worship him' whose names are not in the Lamb's book. Two camps. Only the redeemed refuse him.
'He that leadeth into captivity shall go into captivity'; here is 'the patience and the faith of the saints.' Endure. The faithful wait, trusting God's justice.
'He that leadeth into captivity shall go into captivity'; here is 'the patience and the faith of the saints.' Endure. The faithful wait, trusting God's justice.
Another beast rose from the earth, 'two horns like a lamb,' but spoke as a dragon, making all worship the first. False prophet. He apes the lamb but serves the dragon.
Another beast rose from the earth, 'two horns like a lamb,' but spoke as a dragon, making all worship the first. False prophet. He apes the lamb but serves the dragon.
He works wonders, makes 'an image to the beast,' gives it breath, and kills those who will not worship it. Deceiving signs. Lying miracles enforce false worship.
He works wonders, makes 'an image to the beast,' gives it breath, and kills those who will not worship it. Deceiving signs. Lying miracles enforce false worship.
He works wonders, makes 'an image to the beast,' gives it breath, and kills those who will not worship it. Deceiving signs. Lying miracles enforce false worship.
He marks all 'in their right hand, or in their foreheads,' none to buy or sell without it; 'his number is Six hundred threescore and six.' The mark. The beast brands his own; wisdom discerns him.
